name: Abhiuday Pratap Singh
tagline: Full-Stack Developer | Data Analyst | AI Enthusiast
bio: B.Tech in Information Technology from Jaypee University of Information Technology, Himachal Pradesh (2023-2027). Currently pursuing a Post Graduate Program in Product Management using Agentic AI from IIT Madras (2026-2027). I build intelligent, data-driven products across the full stack — from scalable backends and dynamic frontends to explainable AI systems.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology
Post Graduate Program — Product Management using Agentic AI

details: Developed and deployed full-stack web applications using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.
Designed modular UI components and optimized backend queries, reducing page load latency and improving application responsiveness.
Integrated REST APIs and designed PostgreSQL database schemas for dynamic event and sponsor data.
Collaborated using Git-based version control and agile development workflows.
Assisted financial planning support for events and client deliverables.
Coordinated vendors for cost-efficient procurement decisions.
Contributed to sponsorship outreach and revenue initiatives.
Supported operational budgeting and project coordination.
Performed data cleaning, transformation, and exploratory analysis on healthcare datasets using Python and Pandas.
Built analytical reports and dashboards to identify operational inefficiencies.
Applied statistical analysis to derive insights supporting data-driven decision making.

projects.title: StressIntel PRO
projects.subtitle: Explainable AI Stress Diagnostics Platform
projects.description: AI-driven stress diagnostics platform using XGBoost, Random Forest, and behavioral analytics on 24+ stress indicators. Integrated SHAP Explainable AI and OpenCV-based facial analysis for real-time stress prediction. Built Flask APIs and interactive Chart.js dashboards. Achieved 91.2% prediction accuracy.

projects.title: Event Management Web Platform
projects.subtitle: RangManch Event Management Pvt. Ltd.
projects.description: Production-ready event management platform using React.js, Next.js, and PostgreSQL. Implemented dynamic event listings, sponsor modules, and responsive UI components with real-time data updates.

projects.title: ResumeAnalyzer-XAI
projects.subtitle: Explainable ATS Resume Screening Platform
projects.description: AI-powered resume analysis platform evaluating PDFs against 20+ job roles. Built ATS compatibility scoring pipelines using ML models trained on 2,500+ resumes. Integrated SHAP for feature-level contributions and explainable hiring recommendations.

highlights: Secured INR 5+ lakhs in sponsorship funding through strategic outreach and partnership negotiations.
Led financial planning and sponsorship strategy for PARAKRAM 2025 and Le Fiestus 2026.
Managed budgeting workflows and sponsor deliverables across 15+ events.
Coordinated cross-functional teams of 100+ members, ensuring successful execution.
